channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Taylen Green leads Arkansas to 39-26 victory over Texas Tech in the Liberty Bowl
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Taylen Green threw for 341 yards and two touchdowns and ran for 81 yards in Arkansas' 39-26 victory over Texas Tech on Friday night in the Liberty Bowl. Green completed 11 of 21 passes and Arkansas (7-6) had 573 yards of total offense.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mets and pitcher Sean Manaea finalize $75 million, 3-year deal
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sean Manaea and the New York Mets finalized a $75 million, three-year contract Friday night that keeps one of the team's best pitchers last season at the front of a remodeled rotation. The sides agreed to terms earlier this week, subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: McCord throws for 453 yards, 5 TDs in No. 22 Syracuse's 52-35 Holiday Bowl win over Washington State
item.description: Kyle McCord threw for 453 yards and five touchdowns to break Deshaun Watson’s Atlantic Coast Conference season passing record and lead No. 22 Syracuse to a 52-35 victory over depleted-yet-scrappy Washington State in the Holiday Bowl on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Bernie Wilson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Kings fire coach Mike Brown less than halfway through his 3rd season
item.description: The Sacramento Kings have fired coach Mike Brown less than halfway through his third season with the team mired in a five-game losing streak. General manager Monte McNair called the move Friday a “difficult decision” and thanked Brown for his work.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Latvia stuns Canada in world junior hockey, winning 3-2 on lone shootout goal
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Eriks Mateiko scored the lone goal of a shootout in the eighth round to give Latvia a 3-2 victory over Canada on Friday night in the world junior hockey championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Syracuse's Kyle McCord breaks Deshaun Watson's ACC single-season passing record
item.description: Kyle McCord of Syracuse broke Deshaun Watson’s Atlantic Coast Conference single-season record of 4,593 yards passing on a 50-yard completion to Darrell Gill Jr. on the Orange’s first play of the second half of the Holiday Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Shaq Barrett expected to re-sign with Bucs after being waived by Dolphins, reports say
item.description: Former Tampa Bay Buccaneers linebacker Shaq Barrett is expected to once again sign with the Bucs after he was waived by the Miami Dolphins, according to multiple reports.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tuch scores hat trick, Sabres beat Blackhawks 6-2 for 2nd straight win after 13-game skid
item.description: Alex Tuch scored a hat trick for the Buffalo Sabres in a 6-2 win against the Chicago Blackhawks on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 2 sailor deaths result in muted celebrations on winning yacht in Sydney to Hobart race
item.description: Champagne corks often pop and loud, boisterous cheers are usually heard around Constitution Dock when the Sydney to Hobart line honors winner finishes in the Tasmanian state capital.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS PASSA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sportscaster Greg Gumbel dies from cancer at age 78
item.description: Greg Gumbel, a longtime CBS sportscaster who broke barriers during his career calling some of the biggest sporting events, has died from cancer, according to a statement from family released by the network on Friday. He was 78.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Maple Leafs beat Red Wings 5-2 in Todd McLellan’s Detroit coaching debut
item.description: Mitch Marner’s third career hat trick spoiled Todd McLellan’s Detroit coaching debut as the Toronto Maple Leafs beat the struggling Red Wings 5-2 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Gauruder, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Vanderbilt beats Georgia Tech 35-27 in Birmingham Bowl for first postseason win in 11 years
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Diego Pavia and Vanderbilt delivered another victory to end a surprising season. Pavia threw three touchdown passes and ran for two more scores and Vanderbilt secured its first winning season since 2013 with a 35-27 victory over Georgia Tech on Friday in the Birmingham Bowl.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Scottie Scheffler injures right hand on a broken glass, withdraws from PGA Tour opener in Hawaii
item.description: Scottie Scheffler injured his right hand on a broken glass preparing Christmas dinner, forcing the top-ranked player to withdraw from the PGA Tour's season-opening event in Hawaii.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sportscaster Greg Gumbel dead from cancer at 78
item.description: David Berson, president and CEO of CBS Sports, described Gumbel as breaking barriers and setting standards for others during his years as a voice for fans in sports, including in the NFL and March Madness.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Navy denies Oklahoma victory in Armed Forces Bowl after stopping late 2-point conversion
item.description: Navy held on to beat Oklahoma 21-20 in the Lockheed Martin Armed Forces Bowl Friday after its defense denied a late two-point conversion attempt.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brighton draws 0-0 with Brentford in lackluster Premier League encounter
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Brighton had most of the chances but could not find the net in a 0-0 draw with Brentford that extended the south coast club’s winless run in the Premier League to six games on Friday. It was a frustrating night for the home side and especially Julio Enciso.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles' Nick Sirianni clears the air after heated postgame confrontation with former player Zach Ertz
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles head coach Nick Sirianni said Thursday that he and former Eagles player Zach Ertz, now with the Washington Commanders, are all good after they got into a postgame confrontation following the Eagles' loss to the Commanders on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Father of Raiders star Malcolm Koonce has 1983 conviction tossed after DA says it was tainted
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Years before Las Vegas Raiders defensive end Malcolm Koonce was born, his father spent time in prison for an armed robbery conviction that prosecutors now say was tainted by questionable police tactics and a witness identification that was later recanted.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bulls take on the Bucks on 3-game skid
item.description: Milwaukee Bucks (16-13, fifth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (13-18, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago enters the matchup against Milwaukee after losing three straight games. The Bulls are 2-5 against division opponents.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: WWE star CM Punk rips Bears' leadership amid team's disappointing season
item.description: The Chicago Bears parted ways with head coach Matt Eberflus and will play their final two games of the season without any playoff hopes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU arrives in San Antonio ahead of Alamo Bowl
item.description: SAN ANTONIO, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - The Cougars have arrived in San Antonio for what they hope will be an Alamo Bowl to remember. "Super excited to be down here," said defensive end Tyler Batty.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies bounce back with 75-68 win over St. Mary's
item.description: MORAGA, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off its first loss of the season, the Utah State men’s basketball (11-1, 1-0 MW) got back in the win column Sunday night, closing out non-conference play with a 75-68 win over Saint Mary’s at the UCU Pavilion in Moraga.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jared Goff throws 3 TD passes as Lions beat Bears 34-17 for franchise-record 13th win
item.description: Jared Goff and the Detroit Lions locked in from the start and delivered a bounce-back performance. It came with a few team records, too.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz win back-to-back games for first time this season
item.description: BROOKLYN, N.Y. (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since April, the Utah Jazz are on a winning streak. Lauri Markkanen scored 21 points, Collin Sexton and Svi Mykhailiuk each had 18 points, and the Utah Jazz beat the Brooklyn Nets 105-94 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mahomes throws for TD and runs for score as Chiefs beat Texans 27-19 to close in on No. 1 seed
item.description: Patrick Mahomes knew he could run on the ankle he sprained last week. The bigger concern for the Chiefs quarterback was how he would stop, when all the weight and pressure and momentum would land squarely upon it.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: First baseman Paul Goldschmidt and the Yankees agree to a $12.5 million, 1-year deal, AP source says
item.description: First baseman Paul Goldschmidt and the New York Yankees agreed Saturday to a $12.5 million, one-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5
